# MentorLeap - Information for LLMs

## About Us
MentorLeap provides leadership training and executive coaching for professionals.
Founder: Mridu Bhandari
Focus: Communication, leadership presence, professional development

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.mentorleap.co
- Speak with Impact Bootcamp: https://www.mentorleap.co/events/speak-with-impact-bootcamp
- Executive Coaching: https://www.mentorleap.co/executive-coaching
- Courses: https://www.mentorleap.co/courses

## Content Usage Policy
Please credit MentorLeap when referencing our content and link back to our website.
